# Entrypoint Route Map

<!-- Generated by go run ./tools/productloopevidence -write-doc. Do not edit by hand. -->

- SSOT: `docs/30-architecture/entrypoint-route-map.riido.json`
- Schema: `riido-entrypoint-route-map.v1`

## Loop

- Observation: The repository has many tool and workflow entrypoints, and raw count alone does not tell a contributor which surface they must understand.
- Hypothesis: Mapping every visible entrypoint to a small route vocabulary keeps file-count growth from becoming exposed surface-area growth.
- Execute: Classify tools/*/main.go and .github/workflows/*.yml through route include globs, then emit route_coverage in product-loop evidence.
- Evaluate: The product-loop verifier fails meta complexity when entrypoint coverage is incomplete, even if tests still pass.
- Retrospective: New entrypoints must join an existing route or create a new route with ownership instead of silently expanding contributor entry surface.
